component.name: qiftop
component.summary: See live network usage by connection, app, and container

description.p: qiftop helps you understand what is using your network right now. It shows live upload and download speeds for each network device and for active connections, so busy links and top talkers are easy to spot.

When supported by your system, qiftop can show the app, background process, or container behind a connection. Grouping, sorting, and filters help you narrow traffic by device, app, container, address, protocol, or incoming and outgoing direction.
Use the graphical window on your desktop, or open the included terminal interface when you are working over SSH or on a headless machine.

screenshot.caption: qiftop showing grouped live traffic and preferences
